_comment: Fully worked FICTITIOUS example (not a real client). Copy to brand-config.json and replace every value for the real client. Validated against src/config/brand-config.ts BrandConfigSchema.

registers.name: advisor
registers.label: The Advisor
registers.voiceInstructions: Second-person, measured, warm authority. Short client-story examples. Calm, never hypey. This is the default register for acme.com, the newsletter, and webinars.

registers.name: spark
registers.label: Spark Club
registers.voiceInstructions: High-energy, all-caps allowed for emphasis, confrontational-compassion tone. Community-brand only (Spark Club). Never bleeds into Advisor sends.

hardRules: ZERO em dashes (U+2014) or en dashes (U+2013). Use commas, colons, parentheses, periods, semicolons.
No shame language -- never tell the reader they are lazy or the problem; the system is missing.
No hype, no false scarcity, no ALL-CAPS subject lines.
No unconfirmed merge tokens beyond the confirmed list.
Every email MUST include {{physical_address}} and {{email.unsubscribe_link}} in the body.
contentPattern: Open with a relatable scenario or rhetorical question the reader is quietly living
The pivot line: "Here's the real issue."
The reframe itself: one short punchy line
Name the framework / the fix (a system, not willpower)
One clear next step with honest urgency
emailBlockOrder: HERO: small uppercase eyebrow label, serif headline with one emphasis span wrapped in ..., one-sentence sub
BODY: 2-3 paragraphs, opening in second person, includes the pivot line as its own line
EMPHASIS BLOCK: the reframe as a standalone punchy line
PULL-QUOTE: one short quotable line, attributed to the brand
CTA: one paragraph of honest urgency, then a button

bannedPhrases.replacement: a plan that actually works together

emailDesignSystem.footerNote: You're receiving this because you subscribed to Acme Co updates.
